text:
Wound This field indicates whether the patient has a surgical wound. 00 = No
01 = Yes, patient has at least one (observable) surgical wound
02 = Surgical wound known but not observable due to non-removable
dressing CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1342_STUS_PRBLM_SRGCL_WND M1342 Status of Most Problematic Surgical Wound This field indicates the status of the most problematic (observable) surgical wound. 00 = Newly epithelialized
01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing CHAR 2 x
